---
title: "Teaching"
description-meta: "Teaching experience of Connor L. Brown: field ecology lectures and ecology/environmental science teaching assistantships."
editor: visual
toc: true
number-sections: false
---

# Lectures

[Field Ecology](courses.qmd#field-ecology)

# Teaching Assistant

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
source("R/render-cv.R")
cat(render_teaching())
```
